overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist walking through desert sands along an oasis edge with palm trees and water, gradually approaching the pyramids of Giza in the distance under a bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis edge with palm grove and river

agents.ego_description: protagonist walking steadily along sand dunes beside a palm tree grove and river, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees lining the river edge with green foliage
calm water body reflecting light, bordered by vegetation
rolling orange sand dunes stretching into the distance
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the desert

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks along the edge of a desert oasis, with dense palm trees and a river visible to the left and rolling sand dunes extending to the right. The scene is bright and open under a clear sky, with distant mountains hazy on the horizon.

events.description: the pyramids of Giza come into view on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward toward the pyramids now visible ahead in the desert

entered.detail: large ancient stone pyramid with smooth sides rising from the desert floor
second slightly smaller pyramid visible to the right of the main pyramid

segments.scene_description: As the protagonist continues walking, the ancient pyramids of Giza suddenly appear on the horizon ahead, dominating the view. The river has fallen behind, and the palm trees are now distant on the left, while the vast open desert stretches toward these monumental stone structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the lush edge of a desert oasis toward the monumental scale of the pyramids of Giza. It begins with the protagonist walking beside a river lined with dense palm trees, while rolling sand dunes and hazy mountains stretch across a bright, open horizon. As the journey continues, the river and greenery gradually recede into the distance on the left, leaving the character immersed in the vast, arid expanse of the open desert. The scene then shifts its focus forward as the massive stone structures of the pyramids suddenly emerge on the horizon, dominating the view and becoming the central point of the landscape.
